name: Nut Butter Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Blend the chocolate crumbs, sugar, and melted butter in a medium bowl.
4. Press the mixture onto the bottom and up the sides of the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 5 minutes.
6. Cool.
7. Mix the ice cream, peanut butter, honey, and cashews in a large bowl.
8. Spoon the mixture into the prepared crust.
9. Freeze for at least 2 days.
10. Place the pie in a shallow pan of hot water for 10 seconds before serving.
11. Remove the pie from the pan.
12. Top each serving with sauce and whipped cream.
